markdown:
#  Export Subcontractor Invoices from the Payments Tool 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
A Payments Admin can export the data in view on the 'Subcontractor Invoices' tab of the Payments Tool. To view the invoices created on a project, a Payments Admin needs invoice administrator permissions on that project.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)
  * **Supported File Formats** :
    * [CSV](https://support.procore.com/references/construction-management/acronyms-and-abbreviations)
    * [PDF](https://support.procore.com/references/construction-management/acronyms-and-abbreviations)


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Company level **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Subcontractor Invoices** tab.
  3. Click the **Export** drop-down menu and choose one (1) of these options from the drop-down menu:
     * **CSV**. Downloads a CSV copy of the table data and sends it to you in an email with the subject line: "Your CSV export of Subcontractor Invoices is ready."
     * **PDF**. Generates a PDF copy of the table data and sends it to you in an email with the subject line: "Your PDF export of Subcontractor Invoices is ready." 
#####  Notes
       * Click the **Download** link in the email to view the file on your computer.
       * Any grouping, filtering, and search filters applied to the table data are reflected in the exported file.


## See Also
  * [About the Subcontractor Invoices Tab in the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab-in-the-payments-tool)
  * [Export Subcontractor Invoices as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/export-subcontractor-invoices-as-a-payor)
  * [Procore Pay - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)
title: Export Subcontractor Invoices from the Payments Tool
description: How to export the data table on the 'Subcontractor Invoices' tab of the Company level Payments tool.
